questions.text: Which telecom provider do you currently use as your primary mobile service?
questions.rationale: Reveals competitive positioning and whether viewers are existing Etisalat customers or switcher prospects—critical for ad effectiveness interpretation.

questions.text: What would motivate you most to switch or upgrade your mobile service right now?
questions.rationale: Captures unmet customer needs and purchase drivers beyond ad likeability, enabling deeper insight into ad message relevance and conversion potential.
